visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a beige hoodie stands in a brightly lit indoor room. He holds a white smartphone in his right hand and a blue smartphone in his left, gesturing enthusiastically while looking at the camera. The background features grey curtains and a simple wooden table. (2) Close-up shot on a wooden surface showing two smartphones side-by-side. The left one has a notch at the top of the screen, while the right one has a pill-shaped cutout. A finger interacts with the screens, swiping through menus and adjusting sliders. (3) A split-screen comparison shows the back of the two phones; the blue phone has two large camera lenses vertically aligned, and the white one has a single lens. (4) An outdoor scene is displayed as a sample photo: a multi-story white building with ivy on its walls, viewed from a street corner under a cloudy sky. (5) Back in the studio, the man demonstrates a side button on the blue phone's frame. He then takes a brown leather wallet accessory and snaps it onto the back of the blue phone. When he tries the same with the white phone, the wallet fails to stick and falls onto the table. (6) The man holds both phones over a small glass fish tank filled with water and aquarium decorations like pink coral and a pineapple house. He drops both phones into the water simultaneously, creating a splash. (7) A close-up shot inside the water shows bubbles rising from the submerged phones. The man then reaches into the tank, pulls out the white phone, and shows the screen turning on, demonstrating it is still functional.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: iPhone 16e. (2) [Slogan]: iPhone 16. [Variety]: 有什麼不一樣?. (3) [Slogan]: 價差$8000. (4) [Slogan]: iPhone 16e. [Slogan]: iPhone 16. [Variety]: 有瀏海. [Variety]: 動態島. (5) [Variety]: iPhone 16 亮度更高 1000 尼特. [Slogan]: 1000 尼特. (6) [Slogan]: VS 800 尼特 的 iPhone 16e. [Slogan]: 800 尼特. [Slogan]: 1000 尼特. (7) [Variety]: 還有兩個都 A18 晶片. [Slogan]: A18. (8) [Slogan]: iPhone 16 GPU 多一顆. [Slogan]: 遊戲更順. (9) [Slogan]: iPhone 16 拍照多一顆超廣角. (10) [Slogan]: 拍風景 多人合照 更好用. (11) [Variety]: 而且他還多了一顆. [Slogan]: 拍照按鈕啊!. (12) [Slogan]: iPhone 16 MagSafe 15W 充電. (13) [Variety]: 但 iPhone 16e 有無線充電啊. [Slogan]: 7.5瓦. (14) [Slogan]: iPhone 16e. [Variety]: 沒有 MagSafe!. (15) [Slogan]: 兩支都 IP68 啦. (16) [Variety]: 你喜歡哪一支. (17) [Variety]: 太拼了吧. (18) [Variety]: 可以啊 可以用.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap, glasses, a beige 'ROOTS' brand hoodie, and a yellow smartwatch band.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is an indoor studio with grey vertical curtains and a wooden desk. A brief cutaway shows an outdoor urban street corner with a white building.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic pop music starts with a clear percussive beat. A male voice begins speaking in an energetic, high-arousal tone with clear articulation. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates a visual transition. The speaker's pitch remains high and engaging. (3) Subtle mechanical clicking sounds are heard as the speaker interacts with the devices. (4) A distinct 'thud' and the sound of an object hitting wood occurs as the wallet falls off the phone. The speaker's voice shows a slight comedic inflection. (5) A loud, wet 'splash' sound occurs as the phones enter the water. This is followed immediately by muffled, high-frequency bubbling and gurgling sound effects to simulate an underwater environment. (6) A sharp 'pop' sound effect as the speaker makes a point about the phone still working. The sound of water dripping and being poured back into the tank is clearly audible as the phone is lifted.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Comparison of screen/specs -> Feature demonstration -> Stress test -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a rapid, high-energy comparison between the iPhone 16e and iPhone 16, highlighting key technical differences and hardware features through direct physical demonstration and a dramatic water resistance test to help potential buyers understand the value proposition of each model.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Review format showcasing specific products with brand logos clearly visible and detailed specs discussed.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social-media-native editing with high text density and rhythmic SFX to maintain engagement during technical comparisons.
